old_value: {"id":"broadside-e37d.1","title":"Scaffold Cargo workspace and fieldwork crate","description":"Set up Cargo workspace with two crates: broadside (binary) and fieldwork (library). fieldwork provides: signatures (HTTP sig gen/verify), delivery (queue worker, retry, backoff, circuit breaker), actor (JSON-LD serialization, RSA 2048 keypair gen), webfinger (response builder, acct: URI parsing), fetch (remote actor fetch, caching), db (SQLite pool, migration runner), nodeinfo (2.0/2.1 builder). Add core dependencies: axum, tokio, sqlx, serde, reqwest.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-07-17T22:38:15.0843998Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-17T22:38:15.0843998Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"broadside-e37d.1","depends_on_id":"broadside-e37d","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-17T22:38:15.090086914Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
new_value: {"description":"Set up a single broadside crate (not a workspace). Binary with axum, tokio, sqlx, serde, reqwest, clap. All shared-looking code (HTTP signatures, delivery, actor docs, WebFinger, NodeInfo) lives in modules within this crate for now. Fieldwork extraction into a shared crate is deferred until smallhold needs it — no speculative API design.","title":"Scaffold single-crate Rust project"}
